meta.title: Interview with Robert Malmgren of CS3STHLM
meta.description: Robert Malmgren, Erik Johansson and others from Sweden were attendees of S4 from the early days. They since went on to create the leading ICS security event in Europe, CS3STHLM, which takes place every October in Stockholm. Here I talk with Robert about CS3 at the S4 Cabana Sessions.
